title: Administration
description: The Administration module provides tools for managing users, roles, authentication providers, system configuration, and platform health. Administrators can configure access controls, monitor system status, manage vocabulary, and oversee AI integrations from a centralised interface.
tips: Use the Roles & Permissions page to apply least-privilege access, granting each user only the capabilities required for their role.
Review the Audit Log regularly to track data access and configuration changes for compliance purposes.
Configure Authentication Providers early in your deployment to integrate with your organisation's identity management system.
Check System Health dashboards before major analysis runs to ensure all services are operational.
Use Vocabulary Admin to keep your concept sets aligned with the latest OMOP vocabulary releases.
